arts.sum: QPR are set to sign Spurs forward Yang Min-hyeok on loan until the end of the season, according… The post QPR set to secure loan deal for exciting Spurs prospect appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'On course to be': Tottenham insider shares when Micky van de Ven will now actually return from injury
Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Elfsborg as Richarlison call made, no Maddison
arts.sum: Once again, Postecoglou is going to be limited in terms of players for the Europa League fixture, with question marks surrounding the fitness of Richarlison, Pape Matar Sarr and James Maddison going into the game . Gold's team: Austin; Porro, Dragusin, Davies, Gray; Bentancur, Bissouma, Bergvall; Kulusevski, Son, Moore.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham are now ready to sign 'unbelievable' Manchester United star before deadline day
Tottenham's transfer priority has changed in the final week of the January window
arts.sum: Already without a host of key players, Spurs cannot afford for both Richarlison and Sarr to join the already huge numbers in the treatment room at Hotspur Way. The potential loss of Richarlison to another injury would be a devastating blow for Tottenham at a time when Dominic Solanke is out for six weeks with a knee problem. Heading into this week's games, Postecoglou will be hoping for positive injury news as there are question marks over Richarlison, Pape Matar Sarr and James Maddison at present.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth are in talks with Lorient to sign highly-rated forward Eli Junior Kroupi, with Chelsea and Tottenham also interested in the France Under 19 international
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Bournemouth are in talks to sign highly-rated forward Eli Junior Kroupi, from Lorient. The youngster is enjoying a breakout year in the French second division.
